name: Ishq Junooni
overview: Ishq Junooni is an intense love story about a couple who are brought together by an accident that changes their lives forever. What begins as a moment of fate soon pushes them into a marriage neither was prepared for, he was driven by desire, she driven by circumstance. They’re tied by fate, trapped by conflict, and bound by a marriage that brings them healing and eventually, love.

trailers.title: #new | Ishq Junooni | Pyaar Ya Junoon? Faisla Mushkil 💔🔥 | Dekhiye Sirf #dangaltv Par! #comingsoon
